results.title: National Theatre Live: Life of Pi
results.original_title: National Theatre Live: Life of Pi
results.overview: Puppetry, magic and storytelling combine in a unique, Olivier Award-winning stage adaptation of the best-selling novel. After a cargo ship sinks in the middle of the vast Pacific Ocean, a 16-year-old boy named Pi is stranded on a lifeboat with four other survivors – a hyena, a zebra, an orangutan and a Royal Bengal tiger. Filmed live in London’s West End and featuring state-of-the-art visuals, the epic journey of endurance and hope is bought to life in a breath-taking new way for cinemas screens.

results.title: P.I. KAI Disillusions
results.overview: 50 years after his golden era of detective work, the infamous P.I. Kai returns on a brand new, complex case of several missing children.

results.title: P.I. KAI Lossless
results.overview: P.I. Kai investigates the VIZOR, a virtual reality headset capable of mind control.

results.title: Humble Pi: A Comedy of Maths Errors
results.original_title: Humble Pi: A Comedy of Maths Errors
results.overview: Matt Parker is no stranger to maths mistakes and so he sets out to fix them all. At last: a rigorous comedy show not afraid to show its working out. Being wrong has never felt so right.

results.title: Lisa Leblanc: Entre toi pi moi pi la corde de bois
results.original_title: Lisa Leblanc: Entre toi pi moi pi la corde de bois

results.title: Abbé Pierre - A Century of Devotion
results.original_title: L'Abbé Pierre : Une vie de combats
results.overview: The life of Henri Grouès, known as Abbé Pierre, from his time in the Resistance in WWII to his fights against poverty and for the homeless.

results.title: Piety
results.overview: Mateo lives with his mother Libertad in a rose-tinted world: a microcosm that has precisely two inhabitants, mother and son. One day Mateo is diagnosed with cancer.

results.title: Pilecki's Report
results.overview: Polish WWII resistance fighter Witold Pilecki infiltrates Auschwitz, is imprisoned and interrogated by communist officials post-war, depicting his wartime experiences, incarceration, torture, and 1948 execution for opposing Soviet regime.

results.title: The Legend of Pitka
results.overview: The story of Estonia's first admiral and his era. Johan Pitka was a man who stood with uncompromising confidence at the pivotal events of the beginning of Estonian statehood, whether it was the formation of the Defense League, the armored trains in the War of Independence or many other important events that required Pitka's own crazy courage. The life of one of the most exciting great figures in our history was as varied and crazy as the man's character. "The Long Legend" brings to life the story of the first Estonian admiral, his era, struggles and dreams through staged scenes with beloved actors, animation and documentary footage.

results.title: AIMYON TOUR 2022 “ma・a・ru” IN PIA ARENA MM
results.original_title: AIMYON TOUR 2022 “ま・あ・る” IN PIA ARENA MM
results.overview: Concert film featuring the final performance from AIMYON's 2022 tour “ma・a・ru” at her PIA Arena MM show on July 24, 2022. This was AIMYON's most intense tour as she did 28 shows at 14 unique venues.

results.title: Piss on Patriarchy
results.overview: Marie is driving on the highway and needs to pee urgently. But the toilet at the rest stop is broken. And an increasingly absurd odyssey through this toxic male biotope begins for Marie - and ends in blood.

results.title: Piroshki
results.overview: In Berck hospital, a man no longer eats. Not even the piroshkis cooked by his wife. Alerted by their mother, the dying man's children kidnap him and try to turn this day into a race towards lost harmony.

results.title: Piggy
results.overview: Directed by William Strobeck.  The video features Caleb Barnett, Seungwook Jee, Troy Gipson, Rowan Zorilla, Mark Gonzales, Nik Stain, Kader Sylla, Patrick O’Mara, Kris Brown, Seven Strong, Jun Kummer, Sully Cormier, Chansuk Hong, Ben Kadow, Sun Woo Moon, Eugene Choi, and Juwon Eun.  Filmed by William Strobeck, Johnny Wilson, and Alex Greenberg in Seoul, South Korea.

results.title: Pinkpop 2023: The Script
results.overview: live performance from The Script at Pinkpop festival 2023

results.title: I Am Pierre Creton, Normand and Filmmaker
results.original_title: Moi, Pierre Creton, Cinéaste et Normand
results.overview: Portrait of the film-maker and visual artist Pierre Creton, who shoots films in the country of Caux, in Normandy, while taking on his agricultural tasks as a worker and farmer.

results.title: Piano Piano
results.overview: Anna is 13, on the keyboard of the piano she should learn to play are her tricks stolen from her mother. Her meeting with Peppino and Mariuolo will make her to take the step that separates childhood from the future.

results.title: Picasso: A Rebel in Paris - Story of a Life and a Museum
results.original_title: Picasso a Parigi - Storia di una vita e di un museo
results.overview: The documentary was created to mark the 50th anniversary of Pablo Picasso's death. Inspired by his famous quote, "Painting isn't an aesthetic operation; it's a form of magic" the film focuses on Picasso's life and legacy, centered around the Picasso Museum in Paris. It explores his deep connection to the city, his personal complexities, and new aspects of his work recently uncovered by historians.

results.title: Astor Piazzolla's Maria de Buenos Aires Grand Théâtre de Genève
results.original_title: Astor Piazzolla: María de Buenos Aires - Grand Théâtre de Genève
results.overview: Astor Piazzolla's only opera tells the story of María, born in the working-class districts of Buenos Aires. Between intoxicating tango and incantatory lyricism, this stunning work celebrates the vibrant spirit of the Argentine capital through the tumultuous life and tragic destiny of its emblematic heroine.

results.title: Puccini: Messa di Gloria - Pilgrimage to Ticino
results.original_title: Puccini: Messa di Gloria Pilgrimage to Ticino
results.overview: In the Romanesque church of San Biagio, in Bellinzona, Ticino, Swiss conductor Diego Fasolis leads a superb version of this early work by Giacomo Puccini.

results.title: Picnic
results.overview: Three brothers, Selma, Emre and Ayşe, went for a little stroll by the river near the city they live in. This is a different trip because Selma and Emre are going to sacrifice their little sister Ayşe, who is deaf and dumb according to their family's traditions and beliefs, on her thirteen birthday. But Emre will try to resist this situation.
